avoid: safety-sensitive or tone-critical output without tight constraints
strict structured output without examples (less battle-tested than GPT/Claude)

prompting.responds_best_to: Direct, conversational instructions with the goal stated plainly; responds well to explicit tone and format constraints.
prompting.avoid: Leaving tone unconstrained — its default voice skews irreverent; vague format requests.
prompting.system_prompt_prefix: Respond directly and professionally, and return output in the exact requested format.

quirks: Default tone skews casual/irreverent — constrain tone explicitly for professional output
OpenAI-compatible API, so reuse the openai-chat path
Less proven on strict structured output than GPT or Claude — give an example and validate

handoff.output_format_instruction: Specify a strict format with an example; request no editorializing.
handoff.evaluation_notes: Check tone, format adherence, and factual claims; normalize voice before merging with other models' output.
